headline: U.S. Move To End Huawei Saga Helps China Ties, China Welcomes Huawei Executive Home

headline: EU Rules Could Make USB-C Chargers Mandatory, Apple iPhones May Need Redesign
summary:
Last week, the executive arm of the European Union, the European Commission, proposed a new rule that would require all smartphones to adopt USB-C ports for physical charging.

The commission aims to provide one charger for multiple devices in an effort to reduce e-waste.

headline: Hands On The Wheel! Tesla Launches Full Self Driving Beta Request Button
summary:
